reviews.review_text:
I write this as a warning to anyone thinking of buying this game. If you do anything, go to their comments section on the community update for their roadmap posted on March 6th, 2026. You will see everything you need to see.

I've owned this game since first release. Years ago, I saw the concept trailer on Youtube and was sold immediately. Great graphics with real time feedback to make you feel like you're handling these tight corners yourself. 

I would like to preface what I'm about to say with two things. One, reviews tend to be the deciding factor towards my purchase of a game, and that is why I am doing this. Two, I don't write reviews so take what I'm going to say with a grain of salt.

I have the most interesting relationship with this game, and more to the point the developers. (Whoever they may be). This game handles great... 20% of the time. When I can finally get past the phonk music in the title screen, load myself into a server and spawn in, one of two things happens. I am either immediately shot by one of my teammates in the back of the head, or I get to actually move away from spawn. Once away from spawn, I am introduced to the harsh reality that this game was abandoned by it's creators as soon as it was passed off from the single-desk team that originally crafted the foundation for this broken masterpiece. The motion in the game is bound to get you a nice, searing headache after two games if the matchmaking will let you get through them. Turning corners with long guns will cause a series of aim-in/aim-out movements in your characters arm that, quite frankly, heighten the feeling that I am going to be sick. But once you're around the corner with your weapon, you can finally aim in, see an enemy, fire and...
...
Wonder why a revolver is enough to one-tap a person every time without fail but your 5.56 rifle shot can't. I understand, usage for these weapons would be close to none if you didn't give some incentive to use them. But it just drags everything away when I'm one tapped by someone I already tried blasting with my recoil ridden rifle. 

So you made it through a match. I'm sure you're expecting a reward for your troubles! May I introduce you to the lovely shop system. At the end of every match, you would receive rewards in the form of points you can redeem for skins, weapon skins, and outfits. Any of my fellow early-buyers will tell you that there was a different shop and point system, oh, about a year ago. When they updated this shop system, you lost EVERYTHING you had before the update. All points, all skins, everything. Naturally, when everyone asked about the reasoning to this, we were met with silence. Just more Roadmap updates about new weapons, new maps, fresh graphics updates and optimization that never came. I have been using the same weapons since I first stepped my grubby little paws into the training area. 

And that leads us to where we are now. A lovely song overplayed again and again by so many different disappointed and too-used-to-it players like myself. Sometimes I will still pick it up and see if anything has changed, and I'm always met with the same exact result. I truly hope I am proven wrong by the new development team, but I can assure anyone reading this: that would be Insane.
Game lacks content besides 4 maps. Matchmaking is dead & full of bots. Repetitive & unenjoyable experience.
Over priced, but fun. The second to second gamplay is fun, but it's super repetitive and there's no progression. It feels exactly like a beta/proof of concept.

A great FPS shooter that feels realistic and is a challenge to play with others as you have to be smart with your movement or get punished for it! A good game to load up and pass the time shooting people, runs pretty good and has many options for upscaling and video quality settings as well.
It's fun but way too expensive for what it has to offer. Should really be like $20 at most.

In my opinion, No
The graphics are beautiful but there's no missions, its either dying because your enemy is camping or in the zombie gamemode 90 zombies randomly going to your location. It was fun for the few minutes but not worth the 33 Dollars.
the game stutters sometimes, but overall a good game.
They keep just feature teasing and never release the actual features.   I cannot recommend this game until they stop sitting on their thumbs and get it together.

I do not recommend you to buy this game. It's not that is a bad game its that it's very pricey for the minimal features it has. Sure the graphics are amazing, its well optimized it's just there is not much to do. Hop on zombies a couple times, play online, ragequit because of a hacker. But then after this game robs you of 33$ it then will DEMAND you to pay another 1-10$ on JUST A SKIN if you wanna be in style out fighting zombies with your friends, Or you could play the game for 10 hours and get one that way but its not like I can buy skins with in game currency. Wait until its out of early beta testing, THEN buy the game, its overall just not a good investment right now, currently you should go for stuff like WarHammer 40,000, which is a good investment. Hopefully in the future this game won't let us down and show its worth.
Amazing graphics, realistic gun physics, what more do you want?
They give road map , but still no any update... game is dead...

Good game
Hyper realistic graphics
Needs more time to develop
brilliant game, I prefer playing bodycam compared to my other shooter games, keep up the good work

Make sure you fully understand this game and what you are fixing to purchase. Hands down the biggest waste of money that I have ever spent, literally. What kind of trash is this? Steam this needs to be removed from the Library ASAP unless it is free. Straight SCAM.
Intense and fun. I hope the devs continue to keep finding cool ways to give it it's own spirit.
This game is literal garbage and a scam the graphics are not nearly as good as propagated on YT and the input delay makes it unplayable even CSGO is better than this trash
Underwhelming. The only thing it has going for it is the graphics.
honestly one of my favorite 1st person shooters have bought a few extra copys for buddies who still play 10/10 would recomend
its a good game, but for 33 bucks not worth it plus it gets REALLY repetitive
this game is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. im sorry for the people who played this cash grab unreal engine slop
game has horrible UI that just doesnt work when you click it genuinely unplayable
Very fun, But its the same stuff every time. it gets very boring and theres little to no optimoziation.
Way too many glitches. There's never a fix on these glitches. Fix the damn game
quite good, need a strong pc to enjoy it fully, besides that, great game, nice sounds and realistic.

Just not worth the money with what it currently has to offer, maybe in the future
game is also super dead, hard to find servers with proper players, better off just playing zombie gamemode
The graphics are insanely good and the realism is fun. The only thing that I personally dont like is the fact that there is no controller support

Terrible game do not buy. I left the download running over night only to find 10 hours out I got it sitting on the lobby. I play it for about 20 minutes, and get abt 10fps lowest settings. Not even a hard game on top of that, but if you have a NASA computer it would probably be alright to play.

The realism in this game is insane, but the static doors kind of ruin the immersion. We definitely need the ability to breach or kick doors open. It would add so much tactical depth to room clearing and make close-quarters fights feel way more real
10/10 game it had great grapics and is pretty fun to relax!

DAMN THIS IS THE MOST REALISTIC SHOOTER!!!! This is a VERY fun and some of the guns are SUPER deadly. Also the zombies mode is VERY creepy!! I HIGHLY suggest this game if you want realism and fun gameplay! Keep cooking Reissad!!
It's a solid shooter game, could use some fine tuning and sharpening.

This game is exceptional looking no doubt, but thats where all the good ends, you get a hyper realistic game in which you fight with bots on small map with alot of highly detailed props.

Would I recommend to anyone else sure, only if you have 12 dollars to spare.

This game cannot be a main game and you wont be grinding on it for 200 hours.

I played 43 mins with as much interest as I could, the game looked impressive even with my specs but just didn't tick any boxes for the FUN scale, rest assured its great for just admirring where game dev has come along these years and thts about it.
very realistic ragdolls spot on like real life guns very good shooting sound and the textures of the gun is realistic props tot the dev for this game like GTA 6 but first person with a body
Cool game, great graphics but needs more things to do like missions, progression like weapon attachments and other upgrades.
Amazing Graphics, Dedicated Devs everything a game needs.

Quite possibly the most immersive first person shooter experiences I've ever played. Highly recommend for those looking for a unique, realistic shooter experience.

This game has a decent zombies mode with very shaky but believable first person camera perspective with multiplayer that is alright for its time cannot be too harsh since It is still early access still worthy of review nonetheless.



10/10 would shoot zombies again
Best realistic tactical FPS I currently own. Graphics and movement feel unreal. S TIER GAME

if your into fps games and strat games this is both in one the people are funny and i have really enjoy the game it is very clear that these people put a lot into this project and it is optimized enough to run on my pc

great game I love how realistic some of the effects and ragdolls and stuff are and the prefoirmance on ultra settings is so nice just enable fsr frame gen and it will look like dlss with twice the amount of fps so yeah good game great job Reissad
Refunded because I'm not dealing with getting team killed off spawn every single game I join, either fix this or lose players, it surely can't be that hard to get rid of this issue.
zombies is pretty cool. terrifying but cool.one of the most realistic shooters ive played in a while

very good game. FINALLY someone with enough guts to redesign the omnipotent FPS genre. Could use a kill feed at the very least. Love that these guys are getting away from the last 4 decades of FPS. Everyone is looking for something fresh. I fear this game is before its time. Not enough open minded folks.

hi this is my review on bodycam so the game is pretty good  and graffics but you are gonna need a really good pc for this game if you dont want your game to bug so yea and theres another problem the physics are really bad like your head turns faster then the gun i dont know how to explain it but yea i would recommend the game if its on discount but for this price nah. thanks for reading bye

Amazing, I look forward for a campaign mod where you lead a team into builds and military grade breaching, thanks.

Génial ! J'attends avec impatience un mod de campagne où l'on dirige une équipe pour des opérations de construction et d'infiltration de niveau militaire. Merci !
I do like the game but i also think it needs more time to develop and i also think the price is very high for this much content.

A must have for people with high end gpus or even those new to pc gaming. Barebones with amazing graphics and linear points / leveling systems that will get better. Can't wait for the spring update to be released!
game is okay. community is super salty. they usually kick you if your doing better then them. ggs.

Sent refund request, first of all this is nothing like how YouTube makes it look out to be. This was a blurry, flickering, fuzzy, pixelated cesspool of a game. I actually tried one of the ripoffs before this [with zombies] and that looked more realistic than this.
It runs like ♥♥♥♥, with frame gen it causes unique artifacts and ghosting, dlss is totally trashed.
Only TAA gives you good fps but that makes EPIC look like low 360p.
I really hated every second of it, this was in my wishlist since it came out i think and i wish i didnt buy it.

Now dont get me wrong this is a really good game if your looking for a game with hyper realistic graphics but when you get into the game there really isnt much to do its like a 9/10 person but when you get to know them they have no personality, I really wanted to like this game , I really did but for $33 its not worth it, now if you really want the game I would recommend to buy it when its on sale otherwise save your money its not worth the trouble refunding.

THE GOOD:
Graphics, immersion, sound design are simply top-notch.

THE BAD:
You will never really true adjust to the way the players move, look and shoot. Maybe it's personal preference, but it always feel strange/clunky to me. The matchmaking is borderline dysfunctional, you will get kicked of a dozens lobby before you can even play.

THE UGLY:
Even with all of the above, I would still recommend this game because it's so different ...
IF
it was not for the maps. 
The freaking maps are so tiny, that you are basically spawn camped if you don't move for 2 seconds after getting in the round. And that's true for every map in every modes. I have no idea why they made the same mistake everywhere. Maybe they wanted to force players to fight each other, but there is a limit where you literally don't even time to turn around. Ruined the whole experience for me after really trying to enjoy the game for what it is.

Runs extremely smooth. Extremely realistic FPS. Movement, shooting and graphics are almost exactly how it would be in real life. The game does have some stuff that needs to be added, but i believe if the devs stick with this it will become one of the most realistic fps. Something very hard for even AAA devs to compete with. Insane that 2 brothers around 20 years of age created such a masterpiece!
i did NOT experience a single ounce of lag on this, prob the most goated realistic game but... HOW?! ITS IMPOSSIBLE FOR A REALISTIC GAME NOT TO CRASH UR PCCCCC!!!

This is the definition of having the best-looking game right now but not dropping updates to make it even better. More updates would be great—I'm not saying the game is bad, but it has so much potential that they're just wasting.

At first I thought it was just some realistic shooter game, but after I bought it. i realized it was way more unique than any other shooter i have played. The weapon movement, the game sounds and the gun sights are surreal. Though I know it's not a finished game, I just wanna add that they don't really have much guns at the moment. They have a few pistols, a shotgun, some frags, flashes, AKs and some other rifles. That sounds like a good amount of weapons but after a few rounds it gets repetitive. I know they are probably gonna add a update that adds a lot more things to the guns. That does not change the fact that this is an awesome game, the feel of playing the game, especially in dark rooms is unbeatable. It is also crazy to me how this game, made by 2 developers, is better than almost all triple A games. Btw this games zombie mode is way better and 1000% scarier than call of duty's.

This is my 1st day of playing this game and here are something to say:
1. practise room - yes very helpful.
2. the setting - i set setting to low to counter lags.
3. Lobby is great platform to get connected with friends before enter battle.
4. Player can create ROOM - very helpful for team training or solo to train with bots.
5. so far the lagging is okay. but as we all knew, lagging kills online games. So, you should put this into your priority.
I am so Attached to this game that i cant even stop playing but i need a better GPU and RAM for better experience.
Recoil is not realistic. Controls are slow and clunky. Aside from that, I personally like the game
Very fun game, needs work though with spawn points sometimes being jank, spawning right next to people, and needs better maps, but otherwise great game, hopefully the next update will help.

Used to love this game, however with their latest update, the gunplay feels way slower, to the point where it's not even slightly realistic. It's early access, has been for years, but it honestly feels like the early access to the early access. The game runs great, devs did a spectacular job at optimization. But we've been promised updates that never happen.
combat like no other, but you need some friends to play it with sometimes pretty fun

I love the immersion but its been a massively long wait. I really miss Oil Rig though. the gun play and the weapon feel is precise. this game has the potential to absolutely slam Triple A titles. if they added a structured rank system, loadouts like they promised, and Oil rig they would have a cash cow. I would have all my friends buy this today if that was the case. I am really praying the devs follow through.

The few times i got to play on woods Reissad, the map played amazing. it was beautiful AND PERFECT. And Oil Rig may be the best map in any shooting game ever outside of a few BF4 maps and Dust. My one friend and I were addicted to it. Pls at least let us have it back. Pretty please?

Zombies is literally traumatizing and i couldn't have asked for a better zombie game. The potential for this game is literally to the point where they could rival Battlefield, COD, and Siege.
holy crap , this is epic , very addictive gameplay + realistic graphic . Decent game , 9/10
Game is coming along well, like the gameplay and the realism. Still learning the game, but overall fun!
The game is fun to play but it is very hard to stay in one lobby too buggy for no reason i don't understand why
really good looks like irl bodycam and its better cheaper and has multiplay pvp while ready or not is the other way so get this
really fun game and so realistic would recommend getting it but updates take a while
If there was an something between thumbs up and down i would chose that. Fun game but overpriced.

I like this game a lot. I think the upsides really outweigh the downs.

First of all, it looks great. Every now and then I get a bit lost in the realism. I think the aim assist makes this game extremely accessible, which is definitely gonna be something people complain about, but I'm not a competitive PVP guy, so I really appreciate that I can just jump on a server and stack an acceptable K/D ratio. The gameplay's really fast, respawns are instantaneous. The sound design is absolutely brutal and immersive -- gun shots are realistically freaking loud (to the point you might wanna turn them down a bit, save your eardrums). Downed enemies will agonize on the floor and you can hear them go out for a few seconds, it's kind of crazy and scary when you take a second and observe it.

On the downsides now; the matchmaking is not great, Quick Join is ironically the longest way to join a match. Servers don't seem to have that much activity although you'll always end up finding a game, but there might be bots. The problem with bots though is that they act absolutely braindead. I think it may be some of the worst NPCs I've ever seen in an FPS shooting game, so joining servers that have 80% bots is kind of boring. You'll get some OKAY practice out of them since they're moving targets, but they just suck real bad so it's gonna become a race of who can shoot all the fodder the quickest to win the round. I don't exactly hate that though. Another thing that bothers me is some maps are too small and have ridiculously close spawn points. Paint Ball map is the worst map on the game for sure. You will get spawnkilled in Paint Ball map 50% of the time, it's just ridiculous. Rest of the maps have alright space so it's whatever; just avoid Paint Ball.
Body cam is an insanely fun realistic fps that just feels right. few minor glitches but very playable and very enjoyable
Very realistic. Very simulative. Cool game even without buddies online to play wit.
very realistic and if you like a tactical game this is it. This game is not just realistic its fun
its fun but it lacks content and real players
realy good games scares the $h1t out off me wenn i play the zombie modus at night would recomend
in overall its a nice game but kinda death, and you gotta play with bots

i recommend this game for two reasons. first and most obvious is the stunning visuals, and life-like death animations. the second is the sheer potential this game has. fix a bit of clunk in regards to movement and fix the way the weapons move and feel. fix those two thing and you got a banger

I have played Bodycam for 8.6 hours now. Bodycam is a person shooter game that feels really real. I think they want too much money for it. Bodycam feels very real. The sounds in Bodycam are really good. Playing Bodycam with friends is a lot of fun. Moving around in Bodycam feels a bit awkward. There are not different places to play in Bodycam. Bodycam wants me to spend a lot of money on things. It runs good on my PC. Final Rating: 6.5/10 Bodycam is a good idea and it has a good base but it needs some more work before I cant say that everyone should buy it.
Cool - nice graphics and controls. I totally recommend it if you wanna relax and have some fun. I wouldn't say that its super competitive game but its really fun to have.
Very good game, very fun, amazing graphics, good game in general 😁😎
Nice and realistic gameplay and good maps, just wish there where more types of rifles and guns
was good at first but wayyyyy too laggy to even play now. huge stutters and game freezes on a 4070....
needs more guns amd let me decide my load out other than that the graphics movement and everything about it is super realistic and fun

Game has a lot of potential and can be very fun but the player base is incredibly small. That's my main complaint, its not easy to play when theres no matchmaking. I enjoy the visuals, sounds, and gameplay. Maybe get some marketing behind it?

verry good game but the reload animation could be better and also the blood physics and the gun physics too. I Dont like that I cant change put any scopes lasers on my gun in the training mode but its a good game for the price

this game is so fun. i never thought i would get such immersion in like 1,500/-. pure fun in deathmatch, versus and so much other modes. Reissad COOKED with the zombie mode. i would definitely suggest it to others.

The game is pretty fun, although repetitive in it's current early access state, though I see the potential, the price point is significantly higher than it should be, and the playerbase numbers are dwindling, if this game wants to survive it should decrease the price point while providing more content for the playerbase.

Great mechanics, feels very real, the only thing im meh about is the lack of game considering the potential of what it could be. I believe if the game had singleplayer/coop scenarios to play through it would really improve flexibility with how you want to play eg hostage situations, bank robberies, or a police bodycam campaign where you're a detective going through police bodycams which the player actively plays but all in due time im sure, in the meantime I will squeeze as much time as i can into this game until it gets too boring

this game is decent, its super realistic and kinda fun in my opinion. some YT vids make it look like its all for the realism and no fun, but I find some fun in this game. skins are good, and gamemodes are fun.
Bing Cha Ling. Buy on Sale and host a game if you want a better chance of a fill.
Now every game i try to play looks like cartoon, best game in every way. I can't wait for the huge update coming
really fun and realistic but my game can run at 5 fps some times
Really good and realistic game, be careful though. It might turn you into a psycho

Bodycam is a pretty decent realistic FPS with a really cool theme and atmosphere. The bodycam style makes the game feel intense and immersive in a way that stands out from most shooters. I also enjoyed the zombies mode more than I expected, and it actually managed to jump scare me a couple of times. It’s definitely a fun game to mess around with when you’re bored, especially with friends. Overall, I’d give it a solid 7/10.
best shooter game ive ever played its so releastic and it has zombies which is my favorite gamemode ive been playing shooters for 8 years luv this game
very realistic and even more fun with friends! dont play if you have ANY form of ptsd or epilepsy
After seeing clips of this game and having gotten a PC recently, this was one of the games on top of my list and I gotta say, it didn't disappoint.
A lot of potential with this one. Not everyone's cup of tea due to the camera angle and controls, but it is a blast and immersive. Small indie team ftw.
i like this game has awesome graphics and realistic blood. you need a good pc for this game
